issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' (when opponent's Character is K.O.'d), not 'Activated'
Condition 'HasAttachedDon' is incorrect. The card requires [DON!! x1] as a cost, not a condition. This should be a cost field, not a condition. Condition should reflect 'Once Per Turn' restriction.
Action should be 'AttachDon' (set DON!! as active on this card), not 'GiveDon'. Also missing the 'up to 1' qualifier and source specification (from DON!! deck).
Missing cost field. The [DON!! x1] requirement must be specified as a cost, separate from conditions and actions.
Missing duration field. '[Your Turn]' in text indicates this effect applies 'DuringYourTurn', not permanently.
